name: Mitchell Newman
bio: Mitchell Newman serves as the Jasper County Sheriff, leading law enforcement efforts across Jasper County from the county seat of Jasper. Sheriff Newman is committed to protecting the deep East Texas community and its natural resources including Sam Rayburn Reservoir.
campaignPromises: Enhance lake patrol operations on Sam Rayburn Reservoir
Crack down on illegal drug manufacturing in rural areas
Improve emergency response for flooding and severe weather events
Maintain strong cooperation with federal and state agencies
Keep Jasper County a safe place to live and visit
